programme.desc: The host covers current events, sharing fresh updates on social, political, and economic topics in plain language to help viewers understand what's happening right now.

programme.title: Worlds Apart with Oksana Boyko
programme.desc: Join Oksana Boyko on WA for fun discussions on today's hot topics! Expect lively debates that welcome different opinions while keeping things respectful and insightful.

programme.title: Headline News
programme.desc: The host presents some of the latest political, social, economic, sports and other major updates and developments of the day.

programme.title: New Order
programme.desc: A global news program analyzing geopolitical developments, power shifts, and emerging trends shaping the modern world through expert insights and reports.

programme.title: Dhruv & Jai
programme.desc: Dhruv returns from London after completing his studies and goes straight to meet Jai. He ends up waiting for him in his room where he remembers their time together through Jai’s poems and photographs. He looks disturbed as he tries to keep one particular memory at bay all the while wondering what will happen when Jai walks in the door.

programme.title: Homecoming
programme.desc: Happiness comes knocking at the door on one of her most gloomy days during the pandemic. She embraces it & now it ain't easy to go

programme.title: Eelu Rani Bhag Gaye
programme.desc: Two teenagers running away from their home comes across a police officer who persuades them not to go, however Eelu & Rani have something else on their mind.

programme.title: On The Way of Love
programme.desc: A simple story of how a husband & wife realizes about the presence & support for each other during the pandemic.

programme.title: Panic
programme.desc: A riveting psychological thriller that propels an aspiring actor's life into chaos when a toothache triggers an unfounded belief in oral cancer, setting off a catastrophic chain of events.

programme.title: The Decision
programme.desc: The Struggle of a Female Actress in the Film Industry: A young woman faces difficulties when working with a demanding director who creates a stressful environment. She expresses her concerns to the producer, but he reacts angrily and uses harsh language toward her. Will the actress decide to find a way to work together or stand up for herself?

programme.title: Swad Anusar
programme.desc: A rich businessman loses his memory after a blow to the head but returns home alive after being thought dead. His family doesn't believe him and he realizes they may have conspired to kill him. He dies after eating poisoned food his wife prepared. His family admits their plot, but he will return with greater vengeance.

programme.title: Two Strangers
programme.desc: This narrative revolves around a man with a scientific background, unwaveringly devoted to science and sceptical of miracles. He’s dealing with a mysterious health condition, leaving every doctor surprised. It’s like a puzzle and everyone around him is clueless about it. In a surprising twist, destiny intervenes to miraculously resolve his health issue, and he remains oblivious to this extraordinary turn of events, adding a layer of intrigue to the unfolding narrative.

programme.title: The Please Book
programme.desc: Dora is a small girl from a rich family who lives with her father, a busy businessman. Due to his busy schedule, he is unable to spend quality time with her. Dora is very lonely and she does not have any friends. Her loneliness ends when one day she finds an old diary with “The Please Book” written on its cover. Soon she discovers it’s not an ordinary diary but a magical book. She believes that whatever you write in The Please Book, comes true.

programme.title: Tohfa
programme.desc: A gentleman bestowed upon his cherished wife an incredibly valuable and heartwarming present, yet fate had a different plan in store for their journey.

programme.title: Upgrade
programme.desc: What happens when Safa a successful, well-to-do, married woman is tempted to open a window to her past and meet her ex-boyfriend Maaz on Valentine’s Day?

programme.title: The Last Clue
programme.desc: It’s Zoey’s 16th birthday, and Samar seems to have forgotten. How can he, after all this time?! Growing up in the same housing complex, going to each other’s birthday parties as a kid? It’s a little different this time. They’re staying home, and they haven’t met in a while. And there may be newly blossoming feelings involved on either side... Did Samar forget, or is this birthday going to be the most memorable one?

programme.title: The Last Bencher
programme.desc: Vishal and Niki have always been project partners since the first year of college. He is the topper and she, the last bencher. Their last project before their virtual graduation is due. Can a topper and last bencher be nothing more than just project partners?

programme.title: The Last Surprise
programme.desc: Yash and Tara are meeting for their first date in this 'new normal.' He is cautious, she is just happy to be free and out in the open again. But she doesn't quite know what he has in store for her. Can dating in this new world feel like the old times? Will she feel the butterflies again after this long?

programme.title: Silence Please
programme.desc: Kartik and Radhika are college best friends. They’re close, share everything, and go to each other for both approvals and advice. But Kartik just found out some very upsetting news that Radhika hid from him. Will their friendship make it through?

programme.title: Second First Date
programme.desc: Ishaan and Fiza's story began over a phone screen. After 4 months, Fiza has finally 'dared' to surprise Ishaan, and they had their first, no wait…second…umm actually, they had a second first date! Would it be awkward or unforgettable?

programme.title: Half Half
programme.desc: From tiffins to secrets — Mansi and Sharan used to share everything as kids. They were those friends who were teased as “girlfriend-boyfriend”, even before they knew what love is. Now, 6 years later, Sharan is on his way to become “famous-shamous”. And Mansi? Well, she just hopes that some things haven’t changed.

programme.title: Jinx
programme.desc: Jenny has paid a surprise visit to Mira’s house to help her through a difficult breakup. But Mira is not happy with this intrusion. Will Jenny find a way to comfort her best friend?

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: At 60, Mr. Mehta is about to give his life’s biggest interview. But his interviewer Malvika isn’t too happy with his answers. Everything depends on this. Will Mr. Mehta make it through?

programme.title: Lawless
programme.desc: We control the fear, you understand? Without the fear, we are all good as dead.’ The notorious gangster Al Capone observed that “Prohibition has made nothing but trouble,” and “I am like any other man. All I do is supply a demand.” Acclaimed director delivers a thrillingly vivid slice of American outlaw history in his epic gangster tale, LAWLESS. LAWLESS is the true story of the infamous Bondurant Brothers: three bootlegging siblings who made a run for the American Dream in Prohibition-era Virginia. The film gathers an ensemble of gifted, dynamic new-generation stars – Tom Hardy, Shia LaBeouf, Jessica Chastain, Jason Clarke, Mia Wasikowska, Dane DeHaan – alongside two of the finest actors of their generations, Guy Pearce and Gary Oldman. A riveting, intense story of Crime and Corruption, Loyalty and Love, Brutality and Tenderness, LAWLESS is a rich addition to the American Gangster Canon.

programme.title: Wrecker
programme.desc: Two beautiful young women taking a trip through the countryside, are terrorized by an unknown driver trying to run them down in a heavy duty tow truck.

programme.title: Jurassic Attack
programme.desc: A group of soldiers attempting to rescue a hostage from a terrorist crash land into unfamiliar jungles which are inhabited by a group of long hidden dinosaurs. Now they must find a way out of this isolated valley before becoming prey for prehistoric predators.

programme.title: Jeepers Creepers 2
programme.desc: Every 23rd spring for 23days, it gets to eat…Stranded on a lonely road, a school bus full of high school players must defend themselves from the Creeper, the winged, flesh-eating terror - ancient beast that resurfaces on the earth every 23 years to feed.

programme.title: Beauty And The Beast
programme.desc: This timeless tale was originally written in 1757. Could Beauty ever love the ghastly lord, the Beast? The year is 1810. After losing his fortune at sea, a bankrupt merchant poor father-of-six, after plucking a scented rose from the repulsive master's garden must do the impossible, permit his daughter Beauty, to take his place and pay for the parent’s sins. Only true love can break the spell.

programme.title: Jurassic Attack
programme.desc: A group of soldiers attempting to rescue a hostage from a terrorist crash land into unfamiliar jungles which are inhabited by a group of long hidden dinosaurs. Now they must find a way out of this isolated valley before becoming prey for prehistoric predators.

programme.title: Jurmana
programme.desc: Inder, a contractor who believes in the power of money, places a bet with his friend Prakash to woo Rama, a simple girl. Rama gets charmed by Inder, but an event forces her to leave the city.

programme.title: Joshila Janbaz
programme.desc: Bhagvathi, a tea vendor, has big dreams for his younger brother, Guna. However, Guna gets killed by his girlfriend's father, who is unaware that his daughter is pregnant.

programme.title: Blissful Beats
programme.desc: Soothing melodies that calm your soul. Let these peaceful tunes create your perfect moment of serenity. A carefully curated collection of rhythms to help you unwind.

programme.title: Disco Dancer
programme.desc: Bring back the flashy disco vibes with this sensational Disco Dancer jukebox. Whether you're a retro lover or a new-age dancer, these beats will keep you moving!

programme.title: Luv Kushh Wrong Mantras & The Anaconda River
programme.desc: Luv and Kush cross an anaconda-filled river to retrieve healing leaves for a sick child.

programme.title: Chorr Police Great Escape Of The Spy & Without Water
programme.desc: Alarmed by screams, Anthony realizes he's innocent but gets caught by the police.

programme.title: Mighty Raju Patang Ka Raaz & Julie Ka Birthday Gift
programme.desc: A kite emits sleep-inducing smoke; Mighty Raju captures the thief behind it.

programme.title: Krishna Aur Balram The Curse Of Golden Deer & The Star Eating Demon
programme.desc: The Maharaja asks Krishna and Balram for holy water to save his son, cursed to stone.

programme.title: Date With Senior School Romance Ep 02
programme.desc: A high school student goes on a date with a senior, leading to comedic and heartfelt moments.

programme.desc: A high school student goes on a date with a senior, leading to comedic and heartfelt moments.

programme.desc: Shashank roasts Roshni during his stand-up act, unaware that 'divorce' is a no-go topic for her. She leaves, hoping never to see him again, but fate has other plans. Stay tuned to be part of their journey and find out where their fate takes them

programme.title: Kuch Love Jaisa Ep 02
